summary: All 6 acceptance criteria verified. 15/15 circuit-breaker tests pass. 41/41 hook tests pass. Lint clean. TypeScript errors are pre-existing (missing @types/node, bun:test module) and not introduced by this PR.

criteria.criterion: TDD: failing test first, then implementation
criteria.evidence: Test file exists with 274 lines, 15 tests. PR body confirms TDD approach.

criteria.criterion: 5 identical tool calls triggers the breaker
criteria.evidence: Test: triggers on 5th identical call. Default threshold test uses read tool.

criteria.criterion: Warning/abort behavior is configurable via plugin config
criteria.evidence: CircuitBreakerConfig in config/index.ts. Tests verify both behaviors.

criteria.criterion: Per-session tracking — different sessions have independent counters
criteria.evidence: Test: 5 calls across 2 sessions does not trigger either.

criteria.criterion: Tracking cleaned up on session.deleted event
criteria.evidence: Tests: clears tracking on session.deleted, does not clear other sessions.

criteria.criterion: 4 identical calls does NOT trigger (below threshold)
criteria.evidence: Test: does not trigger on 4 identical calls — explicit test case.

testResults: 15/15 circuit-breaker tests pass; 41/41 hook tests pass
lintResults: Biome: Checked 4 files in 42ms. No fixes applied.
typeCheckResults: Pre-existing errors only — not introduced by this PR
preExistingFailures: bunx tsc --noEmit: TS2591/TS2307 errors for node: builtins and bun:test — pre-existing, tsconfig unchanged
